claims.claim_text: Gemma 4 is a current Google-backed family of open models.
claims.span_hint: section: Why This Module Matters | paragraph 2; repeated in section: Gemma 4 In A Bigger Landscape | Gemma 4 row
claims.rationale: The official Gemma 4 model card explicitly says Gemma is a family of open models built by Google DeepMind and describes the Gemma 4 release.

claims.claim_text: Gemma 4 has practical local and hosted deployment paths across different hardware environments.
claims.span_hint: section: Why Gemma 4 Is Worth Covering
claims.rationale: Google Cloud's Gemma documentation directly states that Gemma models run on hardware, mobile devices, and hosted services.

claims.claim_text: The Llama family is a major comparison point in the open-model ecosystem with broad distribution support.
claims.span_hint: section: Gemma 4 In A Bigger Landscape | Llama family row
claims.rationale: Meta's official Hugging Face organization establishes the Llama family and its distribution in both original Meta and Transformers formats, but it does not literally state the broader ecosystem-summary phrasing used in the module.

claims.claim_text: Current Qwen releases emphasize multilingual support.
claims.span_hint: section: Gemma 4 In A Bigger Landscape | Qwen family row
claims.rationale: The official Qwen3 model card explicitly lists multilingual support and support for 100+ languages and dialects.

claims.claim_text: Mistral's lineup includes open or open-weight models, including smaller variants framed as efficient deployments.
claims.span_hint: section: Gemma 4 In A Bigger Landscape | Mistral family row
claims.rationale: Mistral's official Mistral 3 announcement describes its open models and positions smaller variants around efficiency and deployability.

further_reading.title: Gemma4
further_reading.why_relevant: Shows current Hugging Face integration details and practical usage notes for Gemma 4.

further_reading.title: Use Gemma open models
further_reading.why_relevant: Documents where and how Gemma models can be deployed across local and hosted environments.

further_reading.title: Meta Llama on Hugging Face
further_reading.why_relevant: Provides an official reference point for another major open-model family used in landscape comparisons.

further_reading.title: Qwen on Hugging Face
further_reading.why_relevant: Shows the current Qwen family and release activity for cross-family comparison.

further_reading.title: Introducing Mistral 3
further_reading.why_relevant: Summarizes Mistral's current open-model positioning and helps contextualize the family in the broader open-model landscape.

notes: Most of the module is pedagogical framing, exercises, or evaluative guidance and does not require inline citation at kubernetes.io/docs-like density. The only loose family-level claim kept as weak_anchor is the Llama row.
